The best solution for your clients

Provide your clients with a professional trading tool featuring advanced analysis, automation, and portfolio management capabilities.

  • Intuitive interface
  • Advanced charts and indicators
  • Mobile trading 24/7
  • Strategy automation

Trading Bot Store

Give clients access to a trading bot marketplace and allow developers to create custom strategies in JavaScript.

  • Ready-made trading strategies
  • Backtesting and optimization
  • JavaScript API for development
  • Monetization for developers

Investment Portfolios

Allow your clients to invest in ready-made portfolios and copy trades from successful traders.

  • PAMM and MAM accounts
  • Social Trading
  • Detailed profitability statistics
  • Automatic trade copying

Frequently Asked Questions

What trading instruments are available? +
The platform provides access to more than 500 instruments including forex, cryptocurrencies, stocks and indices.
How much does the MakeTrades platform cost? +
The platform costs between $1000 and $3000 per month depending on the package and additional features.
What trading instruments are available? +
The platform provides access to more than 500 instruments including forex, cryptocurrencies, stocks and indices.
Do you provide technical support? +
Yes, we provide 24/7 technical support in Russian, English and German.
